thi2:1.0.19: p_19Th2_39"Āturaṁ asuciṁ pūtiṁ,passa nande samussayaṁ;Asubhāya cittaṁ bhāvehi,ekaggaṁ susamāhitaṁ.
thi2:1.0.21: p_19Th2_42"Ye ime satta bojjhaṅgā,maggā nibbānapattiyā;Bhāvitā te mayā sabbe,yathā buddhena desitā.
thi2:1.0.22: p_19Th2_43Diṭṭho hi me so bhagavā,antimoyaṁ samussayo;Vikkhīṇo jātisaṁsāro,natthi dāni punabbhavo"ti.
thi2:1.0.23: p_19Th2_45"Sumuttikāsumuttikā,Sādhumuttikāmhi musalassa;Ahiriko me chattakaṁ vāpi,Ukkhalikā me deḍḍubhaṁ vāti.
thi2:1.0.24: p_19Th2_46Rāgañca ahaṁ dosañca,Cicciṭi cicciṭīti vihanāmi;Sā rukkhamūlamupagamma,Aho sukhanti sukhato jhāyāmī"ti.
thi2:1.0.25: p_19Th2_48"Yāva kāsijanapado,suṅko me tatthako ahu;Taṁ katvā negamo agghaṁ,aḍḍhenagghaṁ ṭhapesi maṁ.
thi2:1.0.26: p_19Th2_49Atha nibbindahaṁ rūpe,nibbindañca virajjahaṁ;Mā puna jātisaṁsāraṁ,sandhāveyyaṁ punappunaṁ;Tisso vijjā sacchikatā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanan"ti.
thi2:1.0.27: p_19Th2_51"Kiñcāpi khomhi kisikā,gilānā bāḷhadubbalā;Daṇḍamolubbha gacchāmi,pabbataṁ abhirūhiya.
thi2:1.0.29: p_19Th2_54"Kiñcāpi khomhi dukkhitā,dubbalā gatayobbanā;Daṇḍamolubbha gacchāmi,pabbataṁ abhirūhiya.
thi2:1.0.30: p_19Th2_55Nikkhipitvāna saṅghāṭiṁ,pattakañca nikujjiya;Nisinnā camhi selamhi,atha cittaṁ vimucci me;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanan"ti.
thi2:1.0.32: p_19Th2_58Uposathaṁ upāgacchiṁ,devakāyābhinandinī;Sājja ekena bhattena,muṇḍā saṅghāṭipārutā;Devakāyaṁ na patthehaṁ,vineyya hadaye daran"ti.
thi2:1.0.33: p_19Th2_60"Uddhaṁ pādatalā amma,adho ve kesamatthakā;Paccavekkhassumaṁ kāyaṁ,asuciṁ pūtigandhikaṁ.
thi2:1.0.34: p_19Th2_61Evaṁ viharamānāya,sabbo rāgo samūhato;Pariḷāho samucchinno,sītibhūtāmhi nibbutā"ti.
thi2:1.0.35: p_19Th2_63"Abhaye bhiduro kāyo,yattha satā puthujjanā;Nikkhipissāmimaṁ dehaṁ,sampajānā satīmatī.
thi2:1.0.36: p_19Th2_64Bahūhi dukkhadhammehi,appamādaratāya me;Taṇhakkhayo anuppatto,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanan"ti.
thi2:1.0.37: p_19Th2_66"Catukkhattuṁ pañcakkhattuṁ,vihārā upanikkhamiṁ;Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,citte avasavattinī;Tassā me aṭṭhamī ratti,yato taṇhā samūhatā.
thi2:1.0.38: p_19Th2_67Bahūhi dukkhadhammehi,appamādaratāya me;Taṇhakkhayo anuppatto,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanan"ti.
